playerBoard.source: Quinnipiac Athletics roster + cumulative stats / ESPN roster
playerBoard.note: This Quinnipiac-first dataset is built from public school-site roster and cumulative stats pages. ESPN was checked too, but Quinnipiac's public ESPN roster feed did not line up cleanly with the current school-site roster.
